title: Anomalous Finance-Trading communication surge in restatement window
narrative: Cross-department email volume between Finance/Accounting and Trading shows 1 anomalous week(s) (z >= 2.0 vs. Jan-2000..Jul-2001 baseline of ~5.0/week) during Aug-Dec 2001, the window surrounding Enron's Q3 loss announcement (Oct 16), SEC inquiry (Oct 22), and restatement 8-K (Nov 8). Peak week 2001-10-08 00:00:00 reached 18 messages (z=4.43). Pattern is consistent with coordination between the groups ahead of and during the disclosure window. Individual threads in the peak weeks warrant content-level review (see hunt #2).

evidence_properties.review_note: z=4.43 spike verified against public disclosure timeline (validated in session Jul 10)
